case_title: MIKE YIP VS. UCSF CAMPUS HR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURTS OWN MOTION TO FEB-23-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MIKE YIP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UCSF CAMPUS HR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHN PEKAREK, RISK MANAGEMENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. DEFENDANT INDICATES THEY WERE ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS UCSF CAMPUS HR. DEFENDANT INDICATES THEIR PROPER NAME OF ENTITY IS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA. JUDGE CASTELLANOS RECUSES HERSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER CITING A CONFLICT OF INTEREST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 139.00 SERVED NOV-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2018 BY PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF MIKE YIP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHN PEKAREK, RISK MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIP, MIKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $214.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,214.00, "UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA PPSM 70(III)(B)(12)" PROVIDES FOR RESTORATION OF PAY, BENEFITS, RIGHTS LOST AS A RESULT OF MANAGEMENT ACTION. PARTIES STIPULATED TO FEBRUARY 2, 2017 FACT FINDERS REPORT OF INVESTIGATOR CLAUDIA VIERA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
